text: 3. Where witness resides within Court's jurisdiction. - A commission for the examination of a person who resides within the local limits of the jurisdiction of the Court issuing the same may be issued to any person whom the Court thinks fit to execute it. High Court Amendment-[Allahabad].For rule 3 substitute the following: "3. Commission to whom issued.-Such commission may be issued to any Court not being a High Court within the local limits of whose jurisdiction such person resides or to any pleader or other person whom the Court thinks fit to execute it and the Court shall direct whether the commission shall be returned to itself or to any subordinate Court."-(22-11-1980).
